programme.title: Airplane Repo: Heist High, Heist Low

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome

programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr pose as avant-garde photographers in a Staten Island park and get animated when pitching to a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Say Yes to the Veg
programme.desc: Valerie is testing ways to get veggies into recipes for kids. Her producer's two grandsons drop by for mac and cheese with hidden cauliflower, jazzed up sweet potato fries, spinach and red pepper stuffed chicken and zucchini and ginger naked cake.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: The Bertinelli Boys Are Back in Town
programme.desc: Valerie is refreshing classic diner fare in a meal for her brothers, David and Patrick, and her nephew, Enzo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: Ree's throwing a cocktail bash for the crew helping to open her store in town. There's a delicious line up of make-ahead portable canapes on the menu.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Birthday Bash
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's family is throwing a joint birthday bash for Todd and his cousin Caleb, so she's cooking up Caleb's barbecue favorite, Spicy Pulled Pork Sliders piled high with fabulous fixins, along with make-ahead Slow Cooker Baked Beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Chicken
programme.desc: It's all about chicken as Ree Drummond whips up four speedy 16-minute meals. First, her Buffalo chicken burgers are perfect when time is short and hungry teenagers are waiting.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Mom Knows Best
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making her visiting mom's favorite food, starting with chocolate mousse and white clam pizza. Because her mom is interested in eating healthy, Ree also makes her so-good-for-you salad and garlic spinach spaghetti.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: A Trade for a Trade
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is teaching Nick to make brown butter buttermilk donuts in exchange for a welding lesson. Then, she makes a cozy Midwest dinner of chicken wild rice hotdish, deep fried broccoli and monster cookie bars for dessert.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Today is Gonna Be a Great Day
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli makes asparagus goat cheese puff pastry in a remote segment for the Today show and then fixes herself a satisfying meal of Mediterranean chicken thighs with potatoes, peppers and feta, herby couscous and a cantaloupe gin fizz.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Picnic at the Vineyard
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is wining and dining her friends who are visiting from Las Vegas. They're headed to Arrington Vineyards, co-owned by Trisha's friend, country singer Kix Brooks, and Trisha makes a picnic with roasted beet and dill dip and pasta salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Afternoon Escape
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood plans a fun day for her friends by taking them to an escape room! But first, they fuel up with coconut vodka cocktails, cornbread panzanella, roasted Cajun nuts and oven beer can chicken.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spice It Up!
programme.desc: The Kitchen is firing on all cylinders with spicy, flavorful recipes, including a fried chicken sandwich with gochujang glaze, chipotle carrot soup and shrimp cocktail with lemon. Plus, Chef Duff Goldman stops by to chat about his new discovery+ show.

programme.title: Best Baker in America: Rocky Mountain States

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Never Rains in Hooterville

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Get Smarter

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Supertramp

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water

programme.title: North Woods Law: Into Thin Air

programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of King Arthur

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Vietnam's Lost POWs

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A sniper shooting on an Alaskan highway leaves a young man dead and a community running scared. As one family grieves, another becomes hell-bent on revenge as they formulate an audacious plot.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lie For Me
programme.desc: Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears along with his savings of $206,000. Detectives discover a woman named Kwaneta Harris has been draining the man's accounts. But as they dig deeper, detectives uncover a massive conspiracy of greed and murder.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Love on the Rocks
programme.desc: In Montrose, Colorado, rock quarry owner and mother, Irene Trujillo, suddenly goes missing. When her daughter's search for their mom comes up empty, 911 is called. Those closest to Irene, including her employees, are suspected of foul play.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Beautiful Mess
programme.desc: When twentysomething Patricia Richmond is found tied up, and murdered in her future in-laws' home, the resort town of Steamboat Springs, Colorado is at a loss.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Farmer's Daughter
programme.desc: Bubbly college student and waitress, Mindy Morgenstern, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment. Family, friends, and the entire town of Valley City, North Dakota help law enforcement identify who could have committed this violent crime.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Old Friends, Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: What starts as an idyllic relationship between neighbouring best friends and business partners takes a wrong turn and ends up in threats, restraining orders, litigation, and ultimately a triple homicide.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Final Curtain
programme.desc: Costa Mesa, California is beautiful place to live, but it comes at a cost. The murder of a young girl and the disappearance of a former Army solider leads investigators down a dark path into the mind of an unassuming killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Snake in the Grass
programme.desc: Police looking into the murders of a married team of sun-drenched Southern California entrepreneurs investigate whether the couple may have found out the hard way that no amount of money is worth losing sleep or your life over.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: The Tuxedo King
programme.desc: When a prominent businessman is kidnapped from a diner parking lot for a multimillion dollar ransom, the NYPD races against the clock to find him alive. Meanwhile, a New York Post reporter uncovers a career making scoop- that could come at a fatal price.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: The Blood Will Not Rest
programme.desc: A crime caught on tape shows Hasidic landlord Menachem Stark in the fight for his life. When his body is found the next day, the NYPD is on the hunt for his killers - leading them to potentially deadly secrets about the beloved Brooklyn landlord.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Crimson End
programme.desc: When two members of a prominent family are murdered in Arkansas, a teenage boy is arrested and pleads guilty. For 24 years one woman believes he is innocent - a member of the victims' family. But once released she is confronted with his true nature.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Undoing Behavior
programme.desc: A 36-year-old woman lies strangled to death in her own home. Clues at the scene indicate she knew her killer well enough to let them in and that the resulting murder was spontaneous. Now, police race to discover who could want this mother dead and why.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Footprints in the Snow
programme.desc: The community in Bozeman, Montana, is rocked when officers find Lauren DeWise deceased and her roommate, Ashley Van Hemert, critically injured. As police search for clues, they realize that they must dive deep into Lauren's life to find her killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: Dead Wrong
programme.desc: Racetrack horse groom Leslie Dickenson is found dead in her dorm, and her death is ruled a suicide. Her family balks, suspecting foul play, but they will face years of torment before a tip sends investigators on a 1400-mile hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Model Predator
programme.desc: When a model scout approaches two high school boys for photos with the lure of cash and a glossy portfolio, they find it hard to resist her advances.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: When a tech-savvy computer whiz fails to make the grade as a pro video gamer, he becomes obsessed with finding internet infamy. What starts as an online prank spirals into a new, deadly crime called 'swatting' that chills the nation.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Death of an Internet Star
programme.desc: When a young fashion designer and mother of three becomes a YouTube star with her online sewing tutorials, the money starts rolling in. But her obsessive and violent ex-boyfriend isn't prepared to let her rise to the top without him in her life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends. Then, a bloody body is discovered in a popular mall and Kenda must make sense of the gruesome and mysterious scene.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew visits Seattle where the food scene is a contrast of high tech sophistication and rugged simplicity.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Houston: Blast and Cast
programme.desc: Andrew gets a taste of Texas-sized personality when he visits the vibrant city of Houston.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Palm Springs
programme.desc: Andrew spotlights the desert oasis of Palm Springs, CA. The sunny resort city features new and iconic spots serving up eats like grilled rib eye and bone marrow butter, the popular reuben stacker and the classic date milkshake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Hampshire Seacoast
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores New Hampshire's seacoast and finds that the bounty of the local waters is the star of the local cuisine, such as shrimp, scallops and haddock stuffed in a baked lobster and loaded into a chowder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Goa
programme.desc: Andrew explores the local cuisine of Goa, a former Portuguese colony in western India.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.desc: Donald and Louie trick Daisy the no-nonsense planner, so the Three Caballeros can play at a high-class party.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: The Great Revolution! Legend Festival!
Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram host a viewers' choice countdown special featuring the Top 10 favorite musical numbers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Zip It
programme.desc: Bree gets a part-time job at a tech store but is overshadowed by Chase. Meanwhile, Adam and Leo build a turbo zip-line in the house and find themselves in competition with Davenport.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Not So Smart Phone
programme.desc: Chase and Adam record themselves doing bionic stunts but then have to scramble to find the phone they used before their secret is exposed. Meanwhile, Leo and Bree scheme to help Perry spend her fortune.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Scramble the Orbs
programme.desc: Leo invents his first high end technology and when he tests the orbs on himself and they appear to work fine. However, problems arise when the orbs can't differentiate between friend and foe and start attacking anyone who comes into contact with Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Taken
programme.desc: Fearful of Krane's plan to destroy the Lab Rats, Douglas makes an attempt to warn the Lab Rats and Davenport about Krane’s evil agenda, but is rebuffed by Davenport.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: All About Eve

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Renaming Boyd's School

programme.title: The Middle: Signals

programme.title: Biography: Ultimate Warrior

programme.title: Forensic Factor: Future of Crime

programme.title: Forensic Factor: A Deadly Affair
programme.desc: Caretaker Larry Mallory notices something unusual while on his way to work. Lying in the middle of the highway is a leg from a department store dummy. When he gets closer, Mallory sees two crows feeding on it. The leg is not plastic, it is flesh.

programme.title: Intervention: Mike
programme.desc: Mike was a loving dad and partner, but a workplace accident led to an addiction to prescription painkillers. After his family left him, he turned to heroin. His current partner Collette fears that he will die without an intervention.

programme.title: Intervention: Amber
programme.desc: Amber was a star hockey goalie in her youth, but a horrific injury led to a dependence on pain medication. Now, she is addicted to cocaine, alcohol and morphine.

programme.title: Intervention: Sarah
programme.desc: Raped when she was only 14 and feeling abandoned by her family, Sarah turned to drugs and became a stripper to support her drug habit.

programme.title: Intervention: Tom
programme.desc: Growing up in neighbourhood run by the mob, Tom got caught up in the gangster lifestyle. He lost his family, job and his house.

programme.title: Intervention: Asa
programme.desc: Born into a mixed-raced family, Asa struggled with low self-esteem and bulimia, and then started using drugs and alcohol.

programme.title: Hoarders: Lisa/ Bertha
programme.desc: Lisa is an active chef, a member of various cooking groups, and a compulsive food hoarder. Bertha picks through trash on her paper route searching for treasures to take home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: Wes-Defying Stunt
programme.desc: Wes gets hometown redemption. Plus, Eric bartends, the boys freak out a tow truck driver and Wes performs the Heimlich maneuver.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: A Car Is Torn
programme.desc: Chris, Wes, and Alex convince Eric to finally trade in his Minivan. Plus, the boys rock some Shock Collar Magic, Wes throws axes, and we introduce The Great Ramsini.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe try to find house sitters for bizarre homes and pose as researchers studying grocery shopping habits. Later, the big loser has a run-in at the drive-thru with astonished customers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal get a little too greedy with fellow shoppers at the market and then offer disservices to a focus group. Tonight's loser learns that the grass is always pinker on the other side.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Fortune Feimster
programme.desc: The chefs replicate Orange Chicken from Panda Express for Fortune Feimster.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Charlotte McKinney
programme.desc: The chefs recreate Charlotte McKinney's favorite all-natural burger. They'll have to use their imagination no stick the landing.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: Find out what objects other than pencils the Jokers have considered putting on people, and whose sister frequently helps on the show. Plus, learn what prop has become a fan favorite.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Find out what Q considers one of the worst punishments of all time, and what prank Joe often pulls on Sal when they're traveling.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Film Fail
programme.desc: Learn why the Joker film in the produce section of grocery stores, what the guys tease Murr about and why the audio team had issues recording in a medical office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Fools on Parade
programme.desc: See why flying a kite isn't a breeze, marvel at a grown man getting a billy goat back massage, and watch a construction worker stain himself pink.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: World Wide Whackos
programme.desc: Find out how a little eye makeup can help you pull off a prank that's both hilarious and scary. Plus, watch things go downhill in a hurry when people try to back that thang up.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe serve up some mischief at White Castle, take on tourists in Times Square and check out customers in a warehouse store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: The guys get liberal with lotion down at the shore, shop from other people's carts in a supermarket and try to scam their way to a free dish of yogurt.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Popcorn Pants
programme.desc: Michael delivers a shock at a shipping store when wine tips over and gets bubble wrap tipsy. Then, at a popcorn shop, he dons the latest kernel fashions, and at a theater he stuns his helper with a trick that jumps off the screen.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 10
programme.desc: Bums fight over a bike tire, a naked guy uses his guitar as a weapon, and rappers box even worse than they rap.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 12
programme.desc: A drunk who doesn't know when to leave the party, a large lady who re-defines 'crushing on a boyfriend,' and Canadian street fighters acting very Canadian.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Brawlers 13
programme.desc: Watch 20 of the wildest, most pointless brawls every captured on film. You'll see a vicious slap fight, a seriously low blow, and some amazing girl on girl on girl action.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: Find out how many laser nipples one man can stand and who the sexy fireman who 'rescues' Sal from the bathroom of horrors really is.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Modern Family: Me? Jealous?
programme.desc: Phil is so preoccupied with impressing his new business partner that he doesn't realize the man is being overtly inappropriate with Claire.

programme.title: Modern Family: Aunt Mommy
programme.desc: After selling a house to Mitch and Cam's friends, Phil and Claire take the two of them out for a celebratory dinner where they proceed to over-indulge in drinks, which leads to some over-sharing.

programme.title: Modern Family: Virgin Territory
programme.desc: It's a day of disturbing realizations when Mitchell manages to ruin one of Jay's proudest golf moments, Phil overhears something that may forever change how he sees his little girl and Gloria stumbles upon Claire's dangerous little secret.

programme.title: Modern Family: Leap Day
programme.desc: Cameron's birthday falls on Leap Day, and with opportunities to celebrate so few and far between, the pressure for Mitchell to get it right is exceptional.

programme.title: Modern Family: Send Out the Clowns
programme.desc: A funeral service reunites Cameron with his estranged ex-clown partner. Phil is serious about landing a very important listing, only to be trumped by a notorious bulldozer of an agent. Manny has a cool new friend that makes Jay and Gloria suspicious.

programme.title: Modern Family: Election Day
programme.desc: The entire family rallies for some last minute campaigning on Election Day. Mitch and Cam ride around in a 'Vote for Claire' mobile, the Dunphy home becomes campaign central with everyone manning the phones, and Claire does some last-minute interviews.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Last Walt
programme.desc: Claire delicately helps Luke cope with the fact that his friend and their old neighbour, Walt, has passed. Phil takes Alex for some father-daughter bonding time, and Haley throws an unauthorized party.

programme.title: Modern Family: Disneyland
programme.desc: Phil tries hard to keep up with Luke when the Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan visits Disneyland. Claire is shocked when they run into Dylan, and Jay and Gloria disagree about sensible shoes for the park.

programme.title: Modern Family: Tableau Vivant
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria get on each other's nerves while trying to order lunch at their local diner, Phil is put in the position of having to fire Mitchell, and Cam and Claire have opposing theories on how to discipline children.

programme.title: Modern Family: Baby on Board
programme.desc: Gloria accompanies Cam and Mitch as a translator for their newest adoption. Jay and Manny bring Lily to her dance recital, while Claire and Phil have a proud parenting moment when they send Alex off to her first prom.

programme.title: Botched: Two Weddings and a Divorce Attorney
programme.desc: Two former brides who weren’t able to have the wedding of their dreams come to see Dr. Nassif and Dr. Dubrow. A divorce attorney with a boob tassel fetish appeals to have her areolas fixed.

programme.title: Botched: It's Called Bimbofication
programme.desc: Terry and Paul get schooled on bimbofication and later, a twin undergoes nose surgery to look like his brother again.

programme.title: Botched: Boob Trains and Big Butts
programme.desc: Paul and Terry help former music video vixen Tawny Kitaen get off the boob train. Later a heart shaped nose that gives love a bad name is treated and meet a Brazilian doll that wants a bigger butt.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Who Is Kim Kardashian West?
programme.desc: Kim Kardashian West, arguably the most famous woman in the world, changed the face of social media. See how a reality TV star parlay her massive following into a billion-dollar business.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Harry and Meghan
programme.desc: Go behind this fairy tale romance to explore how Prince Harry and Meghan Markle battled press, racism, and family drama, and broke royal tradition in the name of love. In-depth interviews reveal why they were destined to unite against all odds.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: What's Killing Music's Biggest Stars?
programme.desc: The pressures of fame have led many celebrities down a path of addiction and substance abuse. The situation is worse now than ever making prescription medication the new drug of choice.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Cardi B
programme.desc: Cardi B defines the current moment in pop. But before she ruled rap, she had to overcome poverty and health issues. In-depth interviews reveal how this legend built herself from the ground up while staying unapologetically herself, no matter what.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Death of Innocence
programme.desc: Rebecca Schaeffer, Selena, and Christina Grimmie. Three stars poised to rule the screen and the stage, cut down by obsessed fans who were convinced they shared an intimate bond. We explores their lives, legacies, and the dark side of fame.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Star Sisters
programme.desc: Beyoncé, Britney, and Miley may have blazed the brightest trails, but Solange, Jamie Lynn, and Noah learned from their siblings' pitfalls to succeed on their own. We explore these iconic sisters, their rise to fame and the deep bonds between them.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Brad Pitt
programme.desc: From small-town boy to sexiest man alive, Brad Pitt is a true Hollywood icon. But along the way, he struggled with the limelight and substance abuse. We explore how he faced challenges head-on to tackle the role of a lifetime: being himself.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We’re hanging with Holly Robinson Peete.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moms Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: When Todd refuses to celebrate anyone but Faye for Mother's Day, Julie and Lindsie make their own plans. Todd is forced to babysit Jackson but struggles with Lindsie's new age parenting.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: When Todd offers to be a chauffeur for Faye and her sister Francis, he gets more than he bargained for. Meanwhile, Julie opens a boutique real estate office, but things go awry when she offers to sell Savannah's house.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Prank Master
programme.desc: When Savannah decides to drop out of college Todd hatches a plan to get her back in class. Meanwhile Nanny Faye works overtime to pull an epic prank on Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Remission Control
programme.desc: The Chrisley's take it to the gutter with a family bowling tournament. And while Julie waits to hear if her cancer is in remission, the family plans a surprise for her.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Differing Strokes
programme.desc: Todd and Chase team up for a not so friendly golf match against Jay Demarcus. And Savannah attempts to move in with Nanny Faye only to discover there's no room at the inn!

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaways and Segways
programme.desc: Todd and Savannah butt heads while planning a fashion show for charity. Meanwhile, Chase helps Nanny Faye apply for a job as a Segway tour guide to win a bet with Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Boys to Men
programme.desc: Todd highjacks Chase's 21st birthday plans and forces some father/son bonding time on him. Meanwhile, Julie tries to get Grayson ready for football tryouts but knows nothing about football.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Animal House
programme.desc: Todd gets more than he bargained for when he offers to watch a house full of children. And Julie struggles to let her hair down on a girls' weekend.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Tantrums and Tiaras
programme.desc: Grayson's dream to visit Universal Orlando's Volcano Bay is in jeopardy when his parents work gets in the way.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Quit Your Pitchin'
programme.desc: Todd attempts to train Savannah for a charity softball game despite not knowing how to play himself. When Todd neglects to help Grayson train his new puppy he gets on Julie's bad side.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Over-The-Top Food Fest
programme.desc: Guy invites over-the-top creative chefs to Flavortown.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate Beef Battle
programme.desc: Four meat-loving chefs step into Flavortown to compete in three beef-inspired rounds. First, Guy Fieri asks them to shop for, prepare and plate their best beef burger, and then he gives them scratch-off budget cards with the amount they can spend.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: World Fusion
programme.desc: Guy brings in chefs representing cuisines from all around the world to team up and fuse their cultures' flavours together. The teams create their best spicy dish to see which combination of cultures is the tastiest.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD-licious Burgers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his favorite burger chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives to compete in Flavortown and grill, baby, grill. First, Guy has the chefs shop for ingredients in their signature burger and loaded fries combo using only tongs and a grill lid.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: French Desserts and Cravings
programme.desc: The recruits get to know different types of desserts, and chefs Anne Burrell and Michael Symon teach them how to make classic French eclairs. Then former recruits watch and react to an episode with craveable foods and Chef Alton Brown.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Veggin' Out
programme.desc: Bobby Flay brings out a special guest, activist Beth Stern, along with Food Network's Katie Lee, for an all-vegetarian battle. Vegetarian chefs Cara Nance and Destiny Aponte are down for the challenge because they're all about that veg, no trouble.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Wrapping Up Victory
programme.desc: In the spirit of the holidays, Food Network's Amanda Freitag invites actress Jamie-Lynn Sigler to bring some cheer to the arena. They ho-ho-ho-hope that either Chef Ron Duprat or Chef Gabriel Pascuzzi can slip in Grinch-style to steal the win.

programme.desc: Patrick and Terence Feury duke it out for the nod of approval from Bryan and Michael Voltaggio.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Opry Goes Pink
programme.desc: Trisha sings with Brenda Lee for a breast cancer benefit at the Grand Ole Opry, and the special night inspires Trisha to cook up hometown recipes like sweet and spicy glazed sweet potatoes and stovetop smoked baby back ribs.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Tour Wrap Up
programme.desc: Trisha wraps up a long tour by throwing a dinner for her tour-mates.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Food, Fast!
programme.desc: Trisha invites pro racer Danica Patrick to make a pit stop in her kitchen. Trisha starts the day with recipes that are quick and easy to make, like a Cubano Sandwich with Quick Pickles, Pressure Cooker Potatoes with Smoky Aioli, Three Bean Salad and more.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Italian Comfort Food
programme.desc: Michael Symon mixes some childhood favorites and some new discoveries to make a relaxing Italian dinner with chicken milanese, a butternut squash and farro salad and some espresso granita.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Secrets Show
programme.desc: Katie Lee prepares barbecue potato chip-crusted salmon; Jeff Mauro makes pickle-brined pork chops with sweet and spicy peppers. Restaurant secrets revealed to help make your food taste better.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Try Something New
programme.desc: Everyone's trying something new in the kitchen, starting with Jeff Mauro's flavourful hot cheese crunchy mac and cheese. The hosts share new tricks, including Katie Lee's easy two-ingredient cupcake. Then, Geoffrey experiments with Wok Egg Foo Young.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Spin on Spring
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts spin the Seasonal Wheel of Produce to create recipes showcasing their favorite spring ingredients, including asparagus and rhubarb, in delicious new ways. Chrissy Teigen's mom, Pepper, stops by with the scoop on her new cookbook.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Breakfast All Day

programme.title: Chopped: Family Affair
programme.desc: In the entrée round, chicken breasts seem like an easy protein to work with, but how will the chefs fare with the other mystery ingredients? The final two family members make desserts using dried fruit and a very sweet cake.

programme.title: Chopped: Squab Goals

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Road Killer
programme.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway. Meanwhile, Agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills, duck hunters are confronted for harassment and a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Mr. Bad Guy
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of Teal Season. Later, a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs and a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sunk in Seconds
programme.desc: On Sam Rayburn Lake, Game Wardens Morgan Inman and Austin Cryer discover that a brave citizen rescued passengers from a sunken boat. A suspected poisoning could be the cause of numerous dead doves, and alligators are found on school property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Passing the Torch
programme.desc: As Warden Richards reminisces on his career during the last day on the job, he races to rescue a cow being attacked by a pack of hunting dogs. At the academy, new recruits wrangle a gator, while anglers are caught illegally fishing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Toughest Job in Texas
programme.desc: An alligator poacher brags online and Wardens go after him. Down on the border Wardens pull illegal nets from the river while looking for drug smugglers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens go undercover to stop a black market for buying and selling wild animals. A trio of Wardens work the beaches of Galveston and mobilize when an oil spill threatens wildlife. A robotic deer decoy is used to catch night hunters.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Perfectly Precious Puppies
programme.desc: A poodle wants to explore her country home, but her brother is holding her back.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Terrorizing My Clients
programme.desc: A female cat named Larry with disturbing bouts of aggression threatens to keep Josh and Tara from getting married.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodiles of the Revolution
programme.desc: In East Timor, the Australian Army discovered two crocodiles living in appalling conditions. Steve and his team from Australia Zoo are called to undertake a death-defying crocodile rescue.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Snakes in a Zoo
programme.desc: Reticulated pythons, 'Jodie Foster' and Bali, are two of the most dangerous animals at the zoo. When a window is broken in their habitat, keepers have to find a way of distracting these man-eating creatures so that the repair work can be completed.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: How 'Bout Them Apples
programme.desc: Pete trucks out to Walden, NY, to build a treehouse tasting room for Angry Orchard. The pavilion-style structure will elevate orchard-goers high above the acres of apple trees where they can enjoy a glass of hard cider and soak in views of the orchard.

programme.title: Tanked!: Sweet Memories
programme.desc: A Coney Island Applebee's requests a tank that pays homage to the island while the area rebuilds in the wake of Hurricane Sandy. Back in Vegas, Freed's Bakery requests a cake display case aquarium.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs That Stole Our Hearts
programme.desc: Tia, her kids and the extended Villalobos family reveal the behind the scenes stories of the dogs that have stolen their hearts over the years.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Golden Girl
programme.desc: Mariah faces a challenging rescue when she realizes the dog in danger is deaf. Former adopters come back to Villalobos set on adopting a special needs dog. And the rescue struggles to track down a dog's owner because of outdated microchip information.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for the illusive big horn sheep in the mountains of West Texas. A family near Houston reports shots from a neighboring ranch are raining down on their home. Wardens track down a bow hunter, incriminated by his own game camera.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Greener Pastures
programme.desc: With predators stalking the homestead, the need for safe grazing land for cattle is greater than ever. Atz Sr and Atz Lee head to Perl Island to begin plans for new pasture, while Otto and Eivin set to work transporting a small herd to the island by boat.

programme.title: Movie: Madea Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: Nobody's Fool
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman takes in her sister Tanya when she's released from prison, but when Tanya discovers that her sister's being catfished by an unknown guy online the two team up to find the perpetrator and get revenge for his treachery.

programme.title: Twenties: What Would Todd Do?

programme.desc: The Banks hold a séance, but Will's antics cause the medium to put a curse on the family.

programme.desc: Nikki buys a burial plot for herself and Professor Oglevee from a shady undertaker.

programme.desc: Nikki blackmails Oglevee into attending therapy; T and Stevie snap celebrity photos.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Mack Is Like Wo

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Three)

programme.desc: Martin and a friend find themselves in big trouble after committing credit card fraud.

programme.desc: Will hopes to improve his falling grades by introducing his professor to Hilary.

programme.desc: Cora lands a full time teaching job but struggles when Angie shows up drunk to class.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: Chris and Ruth Miller are frightened to realize their daughter is missing from her bedroom. Although they cannot physically see her, they can hear her cries for help and contact a physicist friend, Bill.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Person or Persons Unknown
programme.desc: After a night of heavy drinking David Gurney awakens to the frightening realization that his wife has no idea who he is. As it turns out, no one has a recollection of who David is and he's slammed in a mental institution.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift
programme.desc: A mysterious man arrives in a Mexican village where he creates uproar among the superstitious citizens. The town doctor and a little boy are the only ones who don't see him as a threat and upset an angry mob.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Little People
programme.desc: Astronauts stumble upon a planet of tiny people who revere one of the men as a god.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Four O'Clock
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is the human manifestation of social conscience. He spends all his time scrutinizing various people whom he believes are evil, and claims to have the power to shrink his victims to a meagre two feet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trade-Ins
programme.desc: John and Marie Holt miss the vitality of youth and want to trade in their bodies for younger ones. Upon visiting the New Life Corporation they are informed the operation costs $5000 per person, double the amount they have.

programme.title: Movie: The Banana Splits Movie
programme.desc: When a family visits a taping of the Banana Splits TV show, things take an unexpected turn - and the body count quickly rises.

programme.title: Movie: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: When a ruthless sultan threatens the lives of his wife and son, a young prince is willing to go to great lengths to keep them safe. An encounter in a cave, high up in the mountain, turns him into the legendary vampire, Dracula.

programme.title: Movie: The Bye Bye Man
programme.desc: Three friends accidentally unleash a terrifying entity known as the Bye Bye Man, an evil behind the most unspeakable acts in history. They discover the only way to avoid possession is to not think or say his name, and they try to stop him for good.

programme.title: Movie: The World's End
programme.desc: Five estranged friends reunite to complete the pub crawl they began in their hometown years before. Plans get complicated when it's discovered the townsfolk are not as they seem.

programme.title: Home Town: Town or Country
programme.desc: David and Taneia own a number of rental properties in Laurel and need Ben and Erin's help to help them choose which one will meet their needs as they enter their empty nester phase.

programme.title: Home Town: From the Big Apple to the Little Catfish
programme.desc: A surgeon and his wife are moving to Laurel from New York City, and their all-in budget goes a long way in the Mississippi town. Ben and Erin pay homage to the historic property's original elements and peculiar charm to design an amazing family home.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Longest Bar in Alabama
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are ready to serve Wetumpka's sole female police officer and youth advocate with the surprise renovation of her dreams. Then, Texas Two Step's Jon Pierre and Mary assist the Napiers in opening up the local sports bars to stunning river views.

programme.title: Home Town: Takeover: Say Yes to Wetumpka
programme.desc: Ben and Erin bring back a piece of history honoring Wetumpka's first female mayor by rejuvenating the event space that shares her name. Then, guests Randy Fenoli makes a bride's big day, and Mina Starsiak Hawk helps renovate the home of two local heroes.

programme.title: Home Town: Country House, City House
programme.desc: A Georgia couple loves the outdoors as much as they love Laurel, and they're in need of a home with a big kitchen and lots of yard space for entertaining. Ben and Erin are determined to bring this couple's outdoorsy ways into the design of their home.

programme.title: Home Town: There's Just Something About a Porch
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a historic home in the country with a porch and plenty of green space. Ben and Erin transform their new home into a classic, dogtrot-style house full of historic charm and Southern touches.

programme.title: Home Town: Leaving the Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds are ready to move out of a parents' garage apartment and into their first home together. With an all-in budget, these two local artists hope to find a house with a master suite, large open kitchen and plenty of room for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Leaving the Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds are ready to move out of a parents' garage apartment and into their first home together. With an all-in budget, these two local artists hope to find a house with a master suite, large open kitchen and plenty of room for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Colourful Custom Cottage
programme.desc: Ben and Erin create a dream house with a stunning kitchen and garden for a local restaurant owner.

programme.title: Home Town: A Little Rough, a Little Refined
programme.desc: Caroline and her husband, Corey, are moving home to follow her dream of opening a men's store. With a budget of $150,000, they're hoping to find a house that matches their authentic, early-century style and has an office worthy of their new business.

programme.title: House Hunters: Diggin' Geothermal in Ohio
programme.desc: A young, newlywed couple is determined to find their first home in Columbus, Ohio. She wants plenty of space to entertain her entire family and wants something that's updated and move-in ready, but he prefers to find a fixer-upper and stay under budget.

programme.title: House Hunters: New vs. Old in Florida
programme.desc: A Florida couple has to move fast after their rental home was sold out from under them. He's all about new construction while she wants old with projects.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A Fairy Tale in Germany
programme.desc: A newly married couple leaves New York City to settle down in the Black Forest region of Germany. They're looking for a place with a large kitchen and plenty of outdoor space, but one wants to be near the city while the other wants to be close to family.

programme.title: House Hunters: An Education in Charleston
programme.desc: A pharmacy student and her parents search for a home in Charleston, South Carolina. She and her mom are pushing for something that's close to school and easy to maintain, but her dad prefers a more classic, traditional-style house with a yard.

programme.title: House Hunters: Settling Down in New Orleans
programme.desc: While a former Marine is not willing to compromise on what she wants for a home in her adopted city of New Orleans, her Navy buddy is along for the ride to make sure she doesn't fixate on minor details and overlook the big picture.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Healing French Country Hideaway
programme.desc: After a lengthy divorce, a British businesswoman realizes her lifelong dream of moving to Creuse, France. She's looking to open a holistic retreat and wants at least two bedrooms, but on her budget, she may not find the spacious land she was hoping for.

programme.title: House Hunters: Jersey Shore Waterfront
programme.desc: A DJ and his fiancee are excited to search for a vacation home on the Jersey Shore. They're looking for a place big enough for visiting family, and she wants a ground-level ranch-style home, but he's looking for something on stilts with rental potential.

programme.title: House Hunters: It's an Us Thing in Atlanta
programme.desc: After selling their townhouse, a young couple searches for a new home in Atlanta. They're looking for something attractive and spacious, and she wants a place in the suburbs that's inexpensive, but he doesn't mind paying more for a home near the city.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Auntie's Treasures
programme.desc: After inheriting their late Aunt Angela's Connecticut home, twin sisters Val and Dina are overwhelmed by all of her possessions.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Farmhouse Finds
programme.desc: Lara Spencer and her team head to a New York farm to help a couple sell his parents' prized collectables. They hope to use the money they raise to fix up the farm, start a new business selling jams and, if anything is left over, take a dream trip.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Memories and Memorabilia
programme.desc: A couple wants to clear out her childhood home that is packed with her parents' collectibles. Lara and her team dig in to find some rare treasures, including scarce political buttons and a vintage candy dispenser worth a surprising amount of money.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Hiding Tons of Treasure
programme.desc: Siblings help their mom downsize her New Jersey home, but they don't know how much their stuff is worth. Lara Spencer and the team help uncover everything from classic dolls to designer coats, and the family hopes it's enough to fund a trip to Germany.

programme.title: Everything But the House: History Funded Future
programme.desc: Lara Spencer and her team help a couple turn inherited items into a college fund for their son. Everything from speakers, turntables and scientific equipment to fabulous 40s costume jewelry gets auctioned off, and the bidding starts at just a dollar.

programme.title: Everything But the House: A Very Stylish Sale
programme.desc: Two cousins decide it's time to let go of their stylish grandmother's upscale collectibles -- everything from designer fashion to elegant hats. Lara Spencer and her expert appraisers help this duo raise the funds to put their niece through nursing school.

programme.title: Everything But the House: An Auction With a Cause
programme.desc: A couple needs help raising money for their food pantry, and they hope to sell everything in his grandfather's former waterfront home. They plan to use their auction profits to help those in need, so Lara and her team work to bring in the big bucks.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Retirement Riches
programme.desc: A woman wants to retire in Aruba, so she, her son and his girlfriend join forces with Lara Spencer and her team of appraisers to find valuable collectibles to auction off and turn into cash for the move. Plus, her son plans a very special surprise find.

programme.title: Home Town: A Vacation Every Day
programme.desc: A couple is moving their family of five inland for a new job. They are looking for a large home with architectural details and space for their three kids. Their budget goes a long way as they consider a 5,000-square-foot brick beauty.

programme.title: Home Town: Can This House Be Saved?
programme.desc: A young woman whose father died when she was a child inherited her family home, but it has been empty for years. She comes to Ben and Erin to see if the house can be saved with her $120,000 budget or if her money is better spent on another property.

programme.title: Home Town: The Cafe House
programme.desc: With an all in budget under $250k, Ben and Erin are able to give the Bell brothers a functioning cafe kitchen, beautiful cafe dining rooms, and an incredibly efficient apartment for Connor.

programme.title: Movie: Dying to Be You

programme.desc: A teenager is happy to have earned a spot on a dance squad, plus, get a boyfriend. When her new boyfriend's ex is found dead, he is under suspicion and she learns her life is also in danger.

programme.title: Movie: Cheerleader Abduction
programme.desc: When the captain of the cheer squad finds out she's pregnant, an underground adoption ring seems to be the solution. But when she goes missing, her mother races to save her daughter and her grandchild before it's too late.

programme.desc: Using archival audio recordings, official transcripts and incident reports, UFO researchers investigate what really happened during incredible and sometimes life-threatening encounters between law enforcement and UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Abduction
programme.desc: Only recently have researchers begun to understand and investigate the phenomenon of alien abduction. While today such claims are dismissed as hoax or delusion, there are time-tested, landmark cases that mainstream scholars struggle to refute.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Tech
programme.desc: Technology has transformed the way we live with artificial intelligence, high-energy laser, antigravity technology and alien-looking aircraft. We discuss if these advances are due to human effort or contact with UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Extraterrestrials and Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Startling evidence suggests contact with interstellar travelers in the distant past may have influenced mankind and many of our sacred sites.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: American UFO Coverups
programme.desc: Recent news of the Pentagon’s secret UFO program may lead to shocking evidence of what the military has hidden for decades.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs and the Presidents: FDR to JFK
programme.desc: Investigators reveal the secret history between US Presidents and the UFO phenomenon, from FDR's knowledge about a UFO battle over Los Angeles to JFK's alleged plan to share extraterrestrial secrets with the Russians.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Native Americans and Star People
programme.desc: Astonishing new evidence and modern-day UFO sightings have experts rethinking ancient otherworldly Native American myths.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs vs. the Royal Air Force
programme.desc: The Royal Air Force has been encountering and even engaging UFOs on a regular basis since World War II, but the British government has continuously denied the sightings. Experts investigate why these UFO facts have been concealed.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs and Temples of Gold
programme.desc: UFO experts investigate whether the value, reverence and desire for gold is the result of extraterrestrial landings in the ancient past.

programme.title: Family Karma: I Kinda Don't Like You
programme.desc: Vishal prepares for the return of his mother-in-law Lopa, who badmouthed his family at the Gala. Meanwhile, Amrit throws a launch party for his new firm, but it turns into a circus when Monica, Anisha and Bali have it out in front of everyone.

programme.title: Family Karma: An Engagement to Remember
programme.desc: Vishal and Richa's engagement party has finally arrived, and relationships are tested as everyone gathers. Amrit's mom introduces his boyfriend as only a 'friend,' and Anisha must confront the realities of her personal life, or lack thereof.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: 50 Shades of Shouhed
programme.desc: Reza and MJ plan a trip to Palm Springs to celebrate Mike's birthday. Mike finds himself embroiled in scandal after his girlfriend, Paulina, calls him out for his wrongdoings with a series of screengrabs she sends to the crew.
