programme.desc: Featuring anvil shooting, a man called 'Thundershin', MRI destruction, demolition fail and jumping out of a chopper without a parachute.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Homemade Hotshots
programme.desc: Counting down the most amazing and dangerous home experiments. Mixing electricity with swimming pools, racing supercharged golf carts and setting off homemade gunpowder.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Epic Skills
programme.desc: Counting down clips that show the most epic skills on the planet. From the most incredible skin, tattooing toes and a speed flier that lands inside a moving cable car.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Win or Fail
programme.desc: This episode includes an out-of-control skydiver, an alarming wasabi prank, a one-wheeled revolution in motoring, and the longest car jump ever attempted.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Features a record-breaking butt skipper, a woman restraining four motorcycles, and the fastest downhill bike ride ever. These guys reveal the very best of human ingenuity and perseverance by doing it like a boss.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Invented Before Its Time?
programme.desc: Music streaming services, animated GIFs and GPS navigation are staples of the digital age, but the team discovers they're not as new as they seem.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Battle of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Features heart-pounding dives, watery graveyards and ancient puzzles from the ocean floor.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Hunt for MH370
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade uses recent discoveries and cutting-edge technology to investigate the whereabouts of flight MH370, and what he uncovers points to an overlooked stretch of water.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Nazi Abyss
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a Nazi evil lurking at the bottom of our oceans: a lost submarine that may be carrying a deadly cargo with the power to unleash doomsday. Cutting-edge underwater technology reveals the threat this cursed vessel still poses today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Caligula's Forbidden Fleet
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates evidence of a lost fleet of ancient ships that once belonged to Rome's mad emperor, and using cutting-edge tech, he reveals these wrecks' link to one of the twentieth century's greatest villains.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade chases new leads in pursuit of the Loch Ness Monster's hiding place. Using the latest evidence and state-of-the-art science, experts might finally reveal the truth behind this legendary monster.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Killer Night Out
programme.desc: Bright and beautiful nurse's aide 19-year-old Janean Brown is found dead in a drainage ditch, her throat cut so deep she is almost decapitated. A riveting investigation will reveal a darker account of the night she died than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son Broke My Heart
programme.desc: When Vickie Webb's son warned her the police might come looking for him, she wasn't surprised. He had been getting into trouble, but she sensed this time was different.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: What If He Was Innocent?
programme.desc: Some say Cameron Todd Willingham was wrongfully convicted, and the court put an innocent man to death. But Stacy Kuykendall knew Todd better than anyone, and she's convinced that he was a monster who was guilty as charged and deserved to die.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Evidence Lost, Justice Found
programme.desc: A young woman riding her bicycle is forced off the road and savagely murdered. Police chase her killer for decades until an overlooked clue ultimately leads to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A compassionate and outgoing woman's dream vacation turns into a deadly nightmare when she crosses paths with a wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: What If He Was Innocent?
programme.desc: Some say Cameron Todd Willingham was wrongfully convicted, and the court put an innocent man to death. But Stacy Kuykendall knew Todd better than anyone, and she's convinced that he was a monster who was guilty as charged and deserved to die.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Evidence Lost, Justice Found
programme.desc: A young woman riding her bicycle is forced off the road and savagely murdered. Police chase her killer for decades until an overlooked clue ultimately leads to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Twisted Justice
programme.desc: An unlikely pair of investigators is tasked with solving a heartbreaking murder that has tormented a family for years.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Chacey Poynter: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: The convicted killer of a Texas firefighter tells her side of the story for the first time.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Vendetta
programme.desc: Texas judge Julie Kocurek was shot multiple times, by an unknown man, in front of her teenage son, in the driveway of their home. She survived and shares her emotional story and her work to stop others from being targeted.

programme.title: True Conviction: Death Undercover
programme.desc: Young mother Nancy Klinger goes missing after telling friends she's going undercover on a black market baby sting.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Job of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Unemployed David Pauley applies to a Craigslist ad offering a tantalizing lifeline just as the recession hits. The job sounds perfect: a live-in caretaker for a ranch in Ohio. But just as soon as he is hired, he disappears - and he isn't the first.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Too Fast, Too Young
programme.desc: After a troubled childhood, 13-year old Christina Long's life seems to be on the up and up. Now living with her beloved Aunt Shelly, Christina is a popular honor student and cheerleader. But when her online life is revealed, it tells a more tragic story.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Fit of Rage
programme.desc: A former basketball star sentenced for abusing a girlfriend; an inmate shoots two deputies dead; a defendant throws chairs; a sex offender attacks a prosecutor; a man leapfrogs his way out of court; and a Rastafarian pot smoker lost in translation.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Do No Harm
programme.desc: A man is driving home when he sees a woman being dragged down the street against her will. Another man is visiting his girlfriend at work on Valentine's Day when a robber leaps onto the counter. Both men take heroic action, ensuring no harm is done.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Out of Control
programme.desc: A drunk passenger grabs the wheel from an Uber driver's hands, creating a potentially deadly scene on a highway. And then, a group of friends on a fishing excursion find themselves in terrifying peril when a speeding boat plows right into them.

programme.title: The Crimes That Changed Us: Patty Hearst
programme.desc: In the chaos of the seventies, leftwing radicals take heiress Patty Hearst hostage and the media, too. While the FBI focuses their efforts on bank robbery charges, a murder goes unsolved. But the son of the slain Myrna Opsahl holds out for justice.

programme.title: Killer Bods: Pride and Payback
programme.desc: Competition among personal trainers at a high-end Florida gym is intense. A new general manager comes aboard to steady the ship, but tension lies just beneath the surface. A volatile mix of pride and rage ignites a horrific and deadly chain reaction.

programme.title: Dateline: The Stranger
programme.desc: She vanished into thin air. Who might have played a role in the mysterious disappearance of Brittany Tavar? There was a handsome boarder and the friend turned enemy or did the free spirit just up and leave on her own?

programme.title: Dateline: The Dream House Mystery
programme.desc: A realtor lands her dream assignment, but turns up dead on the job.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Wife and mother of three Stephanie Roller Bruner has a wonderful life, so her disappearance days before Thanksgiving leads to a massive search. When information of a secret love triangle comes out, the case takes a drastic turn.

programme.title: Betrayed: A Bitter Pill
programme.desc: Newlywed pharmaceutical rep Debbie Ashley turns up dead in her car trunk in a mystery ensnaring her ex-husbands, a doting coworker, her daughter's shadowy boyfriend, and her respected executive husband.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Commandos
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante travels to Manila, in the Philippines, to meet one of the world’s most ruthless prison gangs and find out more about Manila’s streets.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather are looking for a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lone Star State Update
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in their home state of Texas. They're ready to put down roots, but their new lakefront home is in need of some TLC.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Nashville, TN
programme.desc: Casey's mouthwatering mission brings him to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet: three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: O.G. Flavor

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: The Remodel

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Michael Joins a Gym
programme.desc: When Michael is unable to fit into his old jeans, he goes on an extreme fitness regimen.

programme.title: Movie: The Longshots

programme.title: Movie: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: To impress his new girlfriend, Nick offers to drive her kids from Portland to Vancouver.

programme.title: Reba: The Goodbye Guy
programme.desc: In the wake of Barbra Jean telling the IRS that Reba and Brock owe $75,000 in back taxes, Brock decides to pay off the debt by selling his house and moving to Las Vegas.

programme.title: Reba: The Trouble With Dr. Hunky
programme.desc: Reba goes on a date with Dr. Jack Morgan, who has returned to Houston with the intention of resuming his romance with Reba. Later, a startling admission by Jack has Reba seeking advice from Brock.

programme.title: Movie: Love at First Glance
programme.desc: A young woman's hope for a wedding is upended when her fiancé breaks up with her. On her train ride home, she finds herself trading glances with a handsome stranger who, as he exits the train, leaves his phone behind.

programme.title: Movie: Falling for Look Lodge
programme.desc: A woman who dreams of becoming a hotel event coordinator is given the chance to finish planning a wedding. It is for a hotel guest's sister's wedding at a remote lodge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: Frasier: Maris Returns
programme.desc: Niles is shocked when his ex-wife Maris re-enters his life, but he doesn't tell Daphne.

programme.title: Frasier: Murder Most Maris
programme.desc: Niles is a suspected accomplice when his ex-wife is arrested for murdering her lover.

programme.title: Frasier: Guns 'N Neuroses
programme.desc: One thing leads to another when Lilith's friend sets her up on a blind date with Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier: Seabee Jeebies
programme.desc: When his ex-wife Maris is accused of murder, the media frenzy makes Niles a celebrity.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier-Lite
programme.desc: The gang competes against another radio station to see who can lose the most pounds.

programme.title: Frasier: The Ann Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: An accident at home forces Frasier to care for a woman with whom he had a bad date.

programme.title: Frasier: Freudian Sleep
programme.desc: The Cranes go to the mountains and everyone dreams about their worries and fears.

programme.title: Frasier: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: Roz discovers that Frasier was previously married to the children's entertainer Nanny G.

programme.title: Reba: Issues
programme.desc: After observing their constant bickering, Reba and Van's boss insist they see an occupational therapist. Meanwhile, Brock and Barbra Jean consult a sleep doctor.

programme.title: Reba: Brock's Got Stones
programme.desc: While Barbra Jean is away in St. Louis, Reba has to take care of an ailing Brock. Elsewhere, Cheyenne volunteers at a homeless shelter, but is disappointed when she is assigned the unglamorous task of doing dishes in the kitchen.

programme.title: Reba: Parenting With Puppets
programme.desc: After Jake lies about breaking Reba's lamp, Reba is forced to retract her criticism of Barbra Jean's parenting skills. Meanwhile, Brock and Van are mistaken for a gay couple when they spend their 'guy time' at a day spa.

programme.title: Reba: Don't Mess With Taxes
programme.desc: When the IRS audits Reba, she discovers that Brock has a few secrets he doesn't want the IRS to find out about. Meanwhile, Van receives a lot of attention from Cheyenne's classmates when he takes part in a sociology project about marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Grammy-award winner Trisha Yearwood to share her new pet line inspired by her love of rescuing animals. Actress Haylie Duff makes veggie and mango spring rolls in our kitchen.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Tasers

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Stud Muffin
programme.desc: The Baxters' neighbour Chuck Larabee stops by with his german shepherd, Lady, to let them know that their tiny dog, Muffin, has impregnated his dog. Chuck is very selective about who Lady breeds with because purebred german shepherd puppies are in demand.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Eve's Boyfriend
programme.desc: Eve has a new boyfriend, but she refuses to talk about him. After Vanessa pressures her for some good old girl talk, Eve concedes and opens up, much to Vanessa's joy.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Project Mandy
programme.desc: For a class project, Mandy has to showcase her clothing designs at a student fashion show. After the show, the Baxters are beaming with pride for Mandy's success, until she decides to quit school to sell some of her designs.

programme.title: The Middle: Back to School
programme.desc: After a disastrous attempt to get her kids ready for the first day of school, Frankie devises a plan to stay on top of her kids' schedules in order to better organize their lives.

programme.title: The Middle: Homecoming
programme.desc: Axl makes the varsity football team, much to Frankie's delight. As she looks forward to her life-long dream of dressing up and walking with Mike out on the field during homecoming, it turns out that Sue's first cross-country meet is the same day.

programme.title: The Middle: The Diaper Incident
programme.desc: Frankie is humiliated when a store clerk mistakenly assumes she's shopping for adult diapers when she's looking for baby diapers for Sue. Meanwhile, Frankie throws out her back and hides it from Mike.

programme.title: The Middle: The Quarry
programme.desc: When Axl is suspended for skipping school, Mike decides it's time to teach his son a lesson and makes him work with him at the quarry. Mike's plan backfires, however, when Axl likes the job so much that he wants to quit school.

programme.title: Reba: Money Blues
programme.desc: When Reba learns that Cheyenne must document all of her purchases, Reba advises Van to treat Cheyenne more as an equal, but Van decides to give Cheyenne an allowance instead. Meanwhile, Jake starts a lucrative business selling soda to his classmates.

programme.title: Reba: Reba the Landlord
programme.desc: In an effort to save Brock and Barbra Jean from losing their home, Reba and Van buy their house and rent it out to them. Not liking this arrangement, Barbra Jean decides to sue Reba after she sprains her ankle in the house.

programme.title: Reba: The Blonde Leading the Blind
programme.desc: When Reba undergoes laser eye surgery she is left temporarily blind and Barbra Jean insists on helping her until she gets her eyesight back.

programme.title: Reba: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: When Reba, Brock, Cheyenne and Van attend a therapy session, Reba fears things have gone from bad to worse. Later, Barbra Jean crashes the session and they end up telling the therapist about the crazy things they have done to each other over the years.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara
programme.desc: Everyone travels to Niagara Falls for Jim and Pam's wedding. The guys try to hook up while everyone tries to keep Pam's pregnancy a secret.

programme.title: The Office: Niagara

programme.desc: The doctors of Grey Sloan Memorial throw a fundraising gala which turns wildly competitive after Jackson makes a rash promise. Back at the hospital, Bailey’s patience is tested when she has to deal with several extremely difficult patients.

programme.title: The Closer: Fresh Pursuit
programme.desc: While dealing with the stress of not knowing whether or not a judge will drop the charges against her, Brenda and her squad investigate the shooting of a deputy sheriff.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: After finding another victim, Sharon angrily turns her attention back to former LAPD Det. Mark Hickman, who has a secret that may be a motive for murder. Meanwhile, the possible gang war ratchets up a notch with three more murders.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: As more information pours in about victims from the past, and how they tie to the murders of the present, Lt. Cooper and Amy Sykes get caught in an unexpected gun fight. Sharon finds leverage against Rev. Price, his attorney, and Mark Hickman.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hindsight
programme.desc: The conclusion of Hindsight ties all the threads of seven murders together as the video wire on Rev. Price elicits admissions from his younger brother, narrowing the field of suspects to three. Mark Hickman finally confronts the truth about his past.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Present Tense
programme.desc: The Major Crimes squad investigates the mysterious disappearance of a teenage girl, who vanished while volunteering at a homeless shelter. Meanwhile Buzz cracks open the decades old cold case file on the murder of his father and uncle.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Amityville Horror: Murdered One By One Part 1
programme.desc: It was the crime that inspired the legend of the Amityville horror. In November 1974, the DeFeo family were found murdered inside their beautiful seaside home.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Amityville Horror: Evil in the House Part 2
programme.desc: Para psychologists and psychics descend on the house to investigate what really happened that night in Amityville.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: Terror in the Wilderness Part 1
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific rapists and serial killers in Alaska’s history. For more than a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he shot them like prey, until one woman escaped.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away Part 2

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Dating Game Killer: Smooth Talker Part 1
programme.desc: This series reveals the lives and crimes of infamous criminals.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Dating Game Killer: The Bite Mark Part 2
programme.desc: This series reveals the lives and crimes of infamous criminals.

programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.desc: Claire has gone over the top with Halloween in the past, and the neighbours definitely don't share her enthusiasm. This year, she's being forced to tone it down and keep it 'kid-friendly.' Phil has an idea to hold an open house on Halloween night.

programme.title: Modern Family: Yard Sale
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria hold a yard sale to help Manny and Luke with their school's charity fundraiser, and the entire family pitches in.

programme.title: Modern Family: Arrested
programme.desc: Phil and Claire get the dreaded late night call that Haley has been arrested for under-aged drinking, so they bring Mitchell, the family lawyer, in tow to the police station.

programme.title: Modern Family: Mistery Date
programme.desc: When Claire takes Manny and Luke along to Alex's academic decathlon for the weekend, Phil attempts to throw together a boys' night at the house, inviting a fellow Bulldog alum he just met.

programme.title: Modern Family: When a Tree Falls
programme.desc: With some urging, Mitch joins in on Cam's efforts to save an old tree in the park.

programme.title: Modern Family: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Manny and Luke's little league team unexpectedly makes it into a playoff game, so Claire and Cameron scramble to find a location and decide to do a makeover on a rundown field.

programme.title: Modern Family: New Year's Eve
programme.desc: The family goes to a hotel in Palm Springs to celebrate New Year's, which turns out to be less than stellar. Everyone ends up doing their own thing, and Jay runs into Billy Dee Williams. Meanwhile at home, Haley and Alex watch over the kids.

programme.title: Modern Family: Party Crasher
programme.desc: With the baby coming soon, Jay and Gloria go to great lengths to throw Manny an extra special surprise party for his 14th birthday.

programme.title: Modern Family: Fulgencio
programme.desc: Gloria's mom and sister make the voyage from Colombia with baby names and family baggage. No one feels that Phil is able to help with the kids' problems, but there may be a method to his madness.

programme.desc: A successful comedian is set on reinventing himself as a serious actor, but the current spotlight is on his upcoming wedding to a reality TV star. He agrees to be interviewed in the midst of the media frenzy, and is forced to confront his past.

programme.title: Botched: Here Comes Tummy Boo Hoo

programme.title: Botched: Comic Proportions

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pack of Puppies

programme.desc: Tom relocates from Denver to Los Angeles to be with Mike, and they want to find a home quickly before their wedding. Mike hopes to convince Tom to bust their budget and take on a fixer-upper so they can get more bang for their buck.

programme.desc: A couple in Sioux Falls, South Dakota, wants a larger house for their family. She wants a contemporary house with a kitchen she can make her own, while he wants a home with character and will only tolerate 12 steps or less.

programme.title: House Hunters: More Space for Guitars
programme.desc: A married couple and their two teenage daughters search for a home with more space in the Los Angeles suburbs.

programme.desc: A buyer in the medical field is moving from Augusta, GA, to Dallas to start a new life and a new job. She's hoping to find a place that's a close commute to work, has enough room for her friends and has a rooftop deck.

programme.title: Backyard Takeover: Junk Yards and Poisonous Snakes
programme.desc: Jamie Durie digs through a junk pile to create a relaxing space for the kids of a family to study and play. Later, he helps transform a family's backyard from a dangerous forest into a safe Japanese garden for their baby.

programme.title: Backyard Takeover: Jungles and Alligators
programme.desc: Jamie Durie helps a family see the beauty in their overgrown backyard by making a special space for the family to enjoy. Later, he makes a coastal retreat for a Merritt Island family and battles an alligator trying to make their backyard its home.

programme.title: Backyard Takeover: Falling Palms and Overgrown Dreams
programme.desc: Jamie Durie takes big risks to create an oasis for a Palm Springs family. Later, he works with another family to uncover the beauty beneath their wasteland of a backyard.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Executive Escape
programme.desc: After purchasing her mother's house, a woman realizes she needs this property to be profitable in order to keep it. Scott and Debra transform it into an executive escape that will attract business leaders and vacationers alike.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Groovy Getaway
programme.desc: Two siblings need help bringing their 1960s vacation home into the 21st century. Capitalizing on the home's retro design, contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni transform the mid-century cottage into a blast-from-the-past vacation rental.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Reflection Retreat
programme.desc: A homeowner and her son need to start generating income from their lakefront party pad. Using the tranquil surroundings as inspiration, contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni elevate the downtrodden home into a relaxing vacation rental.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Puppy Paradise
programme.desc: Scott McGillivray helps two homeowners whose secluded, lakefront home suffered a flood. With help from designer Debra Salmoni, Scott works to transform their rundown money pit into a pet-cation getaway for animal lovers and their furry family members.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Ski Cottage
programme.desc: After years of neglect, a mountaintop cabin is in desperate need of renovation. Contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni go all in, turning the rustic cottage into a stunning ski chalet ready to start generating vacation rental income.

programme.title: Vacation House Rules: Year-Round Playground
programme.desc: A family's neglected beachfront cabin needs serious repairs. With its proximity to the ski resorts, the year-round rental potential is immense, so contractor Scott McGillivray and designer Debra Salmoni give the dilapidated cabin a four-season makeover.

programme.desc: After a music producer spots Jessie singing a song she wrote, she is over the moon with excitement about the possibility that her big break has finally arrived. Meanwhile, Bertram enlists Emma to help style him for his social network profile photo.

programme.title: Movie: Camp Rock
programme.desc: A teenage girl who desperately wants to go to a prestigious summer rock camp gets a job working in the camp's kitchen. When she is overheard singing by a teen pop star he sets out to find out where the beautiful voice came from.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Saved by the Belle
programme.desc: Booker sets out to win 'Freshest Freshman' for the yearbook, but he's outdone by Nia when she performs the Heimlich maneuver and saves him from choking.

programme.title: Raven's Home: So You Think You Can Drive
programme.desc: Booker and Nia have their learner's permits, but Raven isn't ready to teach them how to drive.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Between A Raccoon and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Gwen befriends a group of campers called the "Extreme Team," known for their gutsy outdoor activities. They invite Gwen to hike to Dead Horse Drop, and she accepts.

programme.title: Bunk'd: MoSquito Mo Problems
programme.desc: Mosquitoes are rampant, so Matteo looks to science to create a repellent. However, he ends up taking credit for something that Gwen invented.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Man! I Feel Like a Genius
programme.desc: When Olive is moved into an advanced math class, Syd pushes to be in the same class but quickly realizes math isn't really her strongest subject.

programme.title: Raven's Home: How I Met Your Mentor
programme.desc: Nia is matched with a high school mentor, whose personality, values and sense of style couldn't be more different.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: It's the first week of high school, and Nia, Booker and Tess find themselves growing in different ways. Nia tries to join all the clubs her bestie, Tess is joininng but ends up feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: Jessie: Pain in the Rear Window
programme.desc: Jessie is in charge of a carnival to help raise funds for the school. In an attempt to help bring in more money, Luke decides to show Jessie some dance moves, but ends up injuring his knee.

programme.title: Jessie: Teacher's Pest
programme.desc: When Zuri is having problems with a teacher at school, Jessie decides to volunteer in Zuri's classroom so she can assess the situation. Because Jessie has always been the teacher’s pet, she figures the teacher will love her but this isn't the case.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sweet 16-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Karen throws Maddie a curveball about the day she was born, and she and Liv realize planning their sweet 16 party together may be more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Sleep-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv volunteers to supervise Parker's sleepover in hopes of reconnecting with him once she realizes just how much he's grown while she was away. Meanwhile, Maddie and Willow work on a school project, and Joey and Pete go on a road trip to Pastrami Palace.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Road Trips and Reunions
programme.desc: Ally keeps winding up in the wrong location when she tries to catch one of Austin's performances.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: What Ifs and Where's Austin?
programme.desc: The gang imagines how their lives would be if they’d never met Austin.

programme.title: Jessie: Morning Rush
programme.desc: A real-time countdown begins as Jessie races against the clock to ensure the Ross kids get to school on time despite countless obstacles that arise.

programme.title: Jessie: Lights, Camera, Distraction!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Puppeteer 2
programme.desc: Manon becomes The Puppeteer again. And she is determined to have fun like never before in a unique playground: the wax museum.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Cat Blanc
programme.desc: When Marinette makes a serious mistake, she has to face the consequences by fighting the last person she ever imagined would get akumatized.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Gone With the Wand
programme.desc: During a trip to Merlin's castle, Cedric's trouble-making niece swipes the famous magician's wand. In doing so, she summons his arch-enemy, Morgana, who wants to keep the wand for herself.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Bunny Swap
programme.desc: When Clover and a wild bunny named Barley mistakenly switch places, Clover must rediscover his wild side so he can find his way home.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Case of the Missing Badge/ Rainy, Rainy, Don't Go Away
programme.desc: When a K-9 pup discovers that her human’s police badge is missing, she enlists the pugs help! The pugs help Auggie and Mo overcome their fear during their first thunderstorm.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Early Birds/ Prank You Very Much

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Treasure Hunters/ Up Up and Oh No
programme.desc: In order to delivery baby Maya, a treasure hunt ensues! Pip and Freddy accidentally let a baby orangutan escape from his crate, and must climb after him.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Pyramid Scheme/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Bongo and Rolly travel to Egypt to find the Great Pyramids. Then, the pugs try to deliver a Mother's Day card for Bob.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The Heelers take turns remembering their favourite thing from the day. It’s Dad’s turn to give the kids breakfast and drop them off at school. Bingo promises to wake up in her own bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Rug Island/ Hairdressers/ Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Dad washes up on the beach of a desert island. Hairdressers Bluey and Bingo discover that their customer has nits! Bluey and Bingo wait for a rubber gecko to fall from the ceiling!

programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a young mother in Oklahoma launches an investigation that reveals a vengeful romance and a murder conspiracy rooted in obsession and greed.

programme.desc: The brutal murder of a woman inside her Kentucky home triggers an investigation that reveals an underage romance fueled by obsession and rage.

programme.desc: Devoted to her faith and her five children, Chanin Starbuck was recently divorced and starting life over. After she was brutally murdered, the investigation revealed secrets. The case divided a family. Could a jury unite on the truth?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVI
programme.desc: Mr. Burns invites Homer and his friends to his big estate for a hunting tournament, but Homer and the gang learn they are the ones being hunted. The Simpsons adopt David, an artificial robot son, after Bart falls into a coma.

programme.title: The Simpsons: See Homer Run
programme.desc: Homer's inability to embrace Lisa's Father's Day book the same way he does Bart's Father's Day Toolman causes Lisa to develop DDD (Disappointed Daughter Disorder). In the meantime, Bart causes a huge car pile-up when he steals a street sign.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last of the Red Hat Mamas
programme.desc: Homer has an altercation with the Easter Bunny at the mayor's egg hunt, causing Marge to be shunned. Marge decides to join a woman's group called The Cheery Red Tomatoes, and agrees to help with an upcoming charity drive.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Italian Bob
programme.desc: After Mr. Burns crashes his Stutz Bearcat, he sends Homer and the family off to Italy to pick up his new fancy sports car. While on their adventure, the Simpsons end up stranded in a village where a rehabilitated Sideshow Bob reigns as mayor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Paternity Coot
programme.desc: Marge's rage against the new toll road system somehow leads to the discovery of a frozen mailman and his 40-year-old mail. The letters are returned to the rightful recipients.

programme.title: The Simpsons: We're on the Road to D'Ohwhere
programme.desc: After Bart steals a key from Principal Skinner's office and gets himself into hot water, Marge and Homer send him to a behaviour modification camp.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Fair Laddy
programme.desc: The Simpsons take in Groundskeeper Willy after Bart accidentally destroys his house. But soon after his arrival, Willy's poor manners become the focus of a bet between Bart and Lisa, as she takes on the challenge of turning him into a proper gentleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Seemingly Never-Ending Story
programme.desc: While cave exploring with his family, Homer causes the cave to crumble and finds himself stuck upside down in the ceiling. Marge and Bart search for help, while Lisa passes the time by telling Homer a story, which turns into a chain of narrated tales.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Has Two Mommies
programme.desc: When Ned Flanders wins a new computer, he offers it to Marge because he has no use for it. In return, Marge babysits the Flanders children so that Ned can attend the Left-Handed Convention, where he meets Randy Johnson of the New York Yankees.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson, This Is Your Wife
programme.desc: Homer's obsession with Lenny's new plasma TV prompts Marge to enter the family in a sweepstakes, and they win a trip to the Fox Studio Lot. Against Marge's wishes, Homer signs them up for a Trading Spouses-type show.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kiss Kiss Bang Bangalore
programme.desc: Homer learns that the nuclear power plant is being shut down and outsourced to India. After Homer is sent to train the new employees, he becomes power hungry in his new position of authority.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Beats Boggs: Ladies Reboot
programme.desc: To one-up the guys, Dee has organized an 'all-female reboot' of the Wade Boggs challenge on a first-of-its-kind, all-female flight headed to L.A. for the women’s march.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Time's Up for the Gang

programme.desc: Abandoned towers of a fearsome warrior civilization and a castle that was once a fairy-tale estate are now haunted ruins. Experts investigate the secrets behind these desolate fortresses to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Shattered: End of Innocence
programme.desc: In 1986, Geri Muck searches desperately for her missing daughter, but she has no idea that she's too late. The prosecutor wants justice, the brother wants revenge, but Geri just wants her daughter back.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Bodies in the Bunker
programme.desc: When 16-year-old aspiring film producer Bohdi Potter and her boyfriend go missing, the grave truth behind their disappearance lies deep in the hollow corridors and dark caverns of an old, abandoned military bunker.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Model Predator
programme.desc: When a model scout approaches two high school boys for photos with the lure of cash and a glossy portfolio, they find it hard to resist her advances.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tortured Hero
programme.desc: When a young Army veteran returns from war, his family is relieved to have him out of harm's way finally. But danger lurks closer to home when a brief encounter on a dating app leads to a devastating tragedy.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Is Rodney Reed Innocent?
programme.desc: A Texas woman is brutally raped and murdered, and the trial sparks a racially charged debate over whether an innocent man has been condemned to death. But as new evidence comes to light, it seems her family may never know who killed Stacey Stites.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Crimson End
programme.desc: When two members of a prominent family are murdered in Arkansas, a teenage boy is arrested and pleads guilty. For 24 years one woman believes he is innocent - a member of the victims' family. But once released she is confronted with his true nature.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tortured Hero
programme.desc: When a young Army veteran returns from war, his family is relieved to have him out of harm's way finally. But danger lurks closer to home when a brief encounter on a dating app leads to a devastating tragedy.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Is Rodney Reed Innocent?
programme.desc: A Texas woman is brutally raped and murdered, and the trial sparks a racially charged debate over whether an innocent man has been condemned to death. But as new evidence comes to light, it seems her family may never know who killed Stacey Stites.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When three women from three different decades meet their death or go missing under mysterious circumstances, authorities are forced to examine the one thing they had in common: they all fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Death of an Internet Star
programme.desc: When a young fashion designer and mother of three becomes a YouTube star with her online sewing tutorials, the money starts rolling in. But her obsessive and violent ex-boyfriend isn't prepared to let her rise to the top without him in her life.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Home Improvement
programme.desc: When a female professional suddenly vanishes, her family and friends are baffled. Two weeks later, a body is discovered along a highway in another county. It carries subtle clues that could lead Detective Garry McFadden right to the killer's door.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Murder Becomes Personal
programme.desc: A case becomes personal for Charlotte, North Carolina Homicide Detective Garry McFadden when a friend becomes a murder victim. It gets doubly personal when the killer also turns out to be someone close to him.

programme.title: Redrum: Fall from Grace
programme.desc: Fred Butner is an up-and-coming attorney and activist in the Key West, Florida area who is found dead after falling from the tallest building in town.

programme.title: Redrum: Fatal Fortune
programme.desc: Cab driver Pam Carter was found suffocated to death in her Reno apartment.

programme.title: Redrum: Twisted Ties
programme.desc: When truck driver James Kelly is shot to death, it's easy to point the finger at a vengeful member of his family. But police soon realize that their suspect is covering up for someone, and find themselves untangling a web of bribery and betrayal.

programme.title: Redrum: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn and his family are driving to a water park when their lives are tragically ended in a roadside shooting. Chris is wounded but survives. As investigators unravel the truth, they find that not everyone in this family was a happy camper.

programme.title: Real Detective: Every Rose Has a Thorn
programme.desc: A missing person case turns suspicious when a well-liked Wausau, WI man doesn't show up for work one morning. Investigator Larry Woebbeking finds himself in an unexpected predicament, when the girlfriend of the victim appears to have fallen for him.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: The Yellow House on Kent Street
programme.desc: Officers find a body slumped behind the wheel of a wrecked SUV. But the driver wasn't killed in the crash he was shot in the abdomen. When Demery connects the case to a pair of alarmingly similar murders, he realizes there's a serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me: The Man Behind the Mosque
programme.desc: When a nameless corpse turns up steps from a local mosque, a community is left shaken. To solve the case, Demery must untangle a web of lies and misdirection. But as detectives close in on the killer, they stumble upon yet another unsolved crime.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lizzie Borden Took an Axe
programme.desc: '48 Hours' takes a fresh look at a very cold case; a double homicide that captured the attention of the nation in 1892, when Lizzie Borden was acquitted of killing her father and stepmother with a hatchet.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Criss-Cross Killer
programme.desc: When Veronica Bozza's body is found bleeding on her living room floor, it sends shockwaves through the close-knit community of Bridgewater. The murder plot leads Nashville's finest to uncover a bizarre unexpected twist right out of a Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: Identical twins Yvette and Doris Gay are a close-knit pair, but when they meet Renwick Gibbs, their quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome. And soon they with devise a murderous scheme that will change one innocent family's life forever.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: The suburbs of Detroit provide a comfortable backdrop for locals to build a life. One family though is quickly headed for disaster when affairs, lies, and explosive arguments lead someone to an early grave.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Betting on Murder
programme.desc: Gail and Stephen Dews have it all: a happy marriage, a beautiful house and healthy children. But a family tragedy and a gambling addiction rips their lives to shreds, proving that nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress

programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A couple reaches a standstill during demolition, so David and Michelle come to the rescue to save their remodel.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Halfway House
programme.desc: Michelle and David are challenged to fix a previous remodel that has left half of a home stuck in the 1980s.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Hawaiian Shirt Renovation
programme.desc: Daniel, Kahina and their new baby live in a charming house built in 1931, but the miniscule master closet is being overrun by Daniel's Hawaiian shirt collection.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: A Touch of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple with an unfinished basement apartment that they would like to rent out, call in David and Michelle Jaime to finish off the work. The siblings bring in natural wood tones and durable kitchen finishes, adding their signature Hawaiian touch.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime take on a whale of a remodel, updating the kitchen, living room and master suite in a home that has been in their client's family for generations.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: House on a Hill
programme.desc: A young family calls on David and Michelle Jaime to update their home that was built in the 1950s. The interior and exterior project involves opening up the floor plan of the kitchen and living room.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Third-Generation Renovation
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime take on Kimo and Jodie's third-generation house, which was built by Jodie's grandparents in the 1950s.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: In Over Their Head
programme.desc: A couple that gets in way over their heads with a DIY renovation call in David and Michelle Jaime to help tackle the job.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Breezeblock Build
programme.desc: A family that has lived all over the world hires David and Michelle Jaime to make their home feel truly Hawaiian.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Backyard Build
programme.desc: David and Michelle Jaime have big plans to take a bland backyard and make it the ultimate hangout for kids and adults.

programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Good Eats: Honey I Shrunk the Cake

programme.title: Good Eats: The Curious Case of Curry

programme.title: Good Eats: Rich Little Poor Boy
programme.desc: One of America's most storied sandwiches gets a historic rethink and a technical do-over, from the oysters to the bread and everything in between. Alton Brown also makes an argument for shucking.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.desc: Andrew travels to Louisville, KY, which boasts one of the most eclectic food scenes in the country. He digs in to Southern favorites with an Asian twist, fried chicken served with a fiery sauce and comfort food for the modern era.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Memphis
programme.desc: Andrew visits Memphis and makes stops at some of the city's most beloved barbecue joints. Then, he drops by one of America's most iconic soul food restaurants and visits a joint where Italian and Southern comfort food are combined.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Joyce and Vince and Peaches and Herb
programme.desc: When Mike decides that the couch is his new best friend, Molly goes out on the town with her sister, Victoria.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: After Han emails photos of a stripper to his mother claiming he has a girlfriend, he asks Max and Caroline to find her and convince her to play his girlfriend while his mother visits from Korea.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Raven-Symone, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Howie Mandel.

programme.title: Black-ish: Hope
programme.desc: When the kids ask some tough questions in the midst of a highly publicized court case involving alleged police brutality and an African-American teenager, Dre and Bow are conflicted on how best to field them.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Gift of Hunger
programme.desc: After the kids turn their collective noses up at Dre's favourite cheap restaurant in his old 'hood, he decides it's time to give them a reality check. He insists all of them get jobs.

programme.title: All American: Bring the Noise
programme.desc: Spencer gets Olivia's help throwing Grace a party. Billy tries to organize a scrimmage game to help with his players' chances at college recruitment. Coop finds herself in a tough spot with Layla. Asher confronts his feelings for his mom's fiancé.

programme.title: Black Lightning: The Book of Resurrection: Chapter Two: Closure
programme.desc: After four seasons, the game-changing, relevant and electrifying series comes to an end.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Bris
programme.desc: George gets a great parking spot at a hospital. Kramer thinks he has discovered a 'pig man.' Elaine and Jerry are nervous about their religious duties when they agree to become godparents.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Kramer urges George to seek a Holistic healer when he thinks he is having a heart attack.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Arguments for the Quickie
programme.desc: When Charlie finds out that Mia is in town with her dance troupe, he opts not to see her and tries to convince Alan that he's over her. Charlie gets another surprise when Mia explains that she wants something personal from him, his sperm.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Frontier Chiropractor
programme.desc: Alan reluctantly agrees to a makeover after seeing Judith's new look. Meanwhile, Evelyn stays at Charlie's house to bond with Jake.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: WrestleMania
programme.desc: Murray decides to buy WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, but he buys fake tickets so they can't get in. Meanwhile, Beverly forms her own neighbourhood watch group.

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Hair and a Teeny Tiny Part of Canada
programme.desc: Bonnie and Adam make a hasty decision.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Lori Vallow Case
programme.desc: Mike and Mandy go to extreme measures to help Vanessa connect with voters in her State Assembly campaign. Meanwhile, Ed's offer to split a baby gift for Kristin and Ryan leads Chuck and Kyle to wonder which of them makes more money.

programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Keep the Change
programme.desc: When Mike and Vanessa invite Jen's father to her graduation, Jen struggles with accepting his 'plus one' his girlfriend, Fiona.

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Eyes and a Wet Brad Pitt
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie are in the lap of luxury when Christy's wealthy sponsee, Jill, asks them to keep her company on her first night out of rehab.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: You Are No Inspector/ Don't Pound on My Floors
programme.desc: Woman sues over poor home inspection; an unusual workout routine causes property damage.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: The Last Time
programme.desc: Two students fight, one with the approval of a parent.

programme.title: Protection Court: My Son and His Grandma/ I Wanna See My Kids
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Hunting Party Spoiled My Wedding/ Death of a Rockstar
programme.desc: Bride claims hall double-booked her reception; neighbor claims a fence injured her dog.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Milton vs. Lewis
programme.desc: An Arizona man accuses his childhood crush of trying to trap him with a baby, but she insists he's the father of her four-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Manship/ Lutman vs. Laupp
programme.desc: A Missouri woman searched for her biological father for 20 years with only a name and photo of her mother with the man who could be her dad.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Arizona says Sable did not pay her back for a personal loan she needed to fix her car. Sable says they are even as she provided Arizona with hair service commensurate with that of the personal loan for free.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her neighbor for damages and emotional distress, claiming he wrecked three cars on her street, damaged her garage and broke her door - and she has the video tape to prove it.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Being All Wet ' and Going On a Rent Strike.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'An H20 Faux-Pas' and ' You Really Think This Place is Clean?'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Pay-Day/ Hazed For Days
programme.desc: A woman claims she was not properly rewarded because of an April Fool’s prank; a young woman demands reimbursement for expenses linked to a sorority.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Leon says Brendan struck his dream car, and had to rent a car for several months. Since Brendan's insurance company would only reimburse Leon for a portion of the expenses, he's suing Brendan. Brendan says Leon violated the insurance policy.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Molestation: Did Your Fears Lead to False Allegations?
programme.desc: Rafael and Keila have been together for 3 years and they have a 2-month-old daughter together. Recently, Rafael hasn’t seen his daughter because Keila kicked him out of the house. Keila says he touched her daughter inappropriately.

programme.title: Maury: I'm Only 19 ... Is the Third Man I'm Testing My Baby's Father?
programme.desc: Emma is back, and this time she is confident that Adarris is the father of her son, but he is not so sure. Then, Kenna is in a paternity triangle between her boyfriend Josh, and Dakota who she cheated with, because both hope to be the father of her baby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Lesbian Strippers Share Their Cookies
programme.desc: Dominic discovered his girlfriend Madison is the jealous type. Destiny believes her girlfriend Shaneiqua is up to no good. Morgan's boyfriend Danny's love interest could be elsewhere.

programme.title: Maury: Still Missing ... National Missing Children's Day
programme.desc: We’ll revisit the missing person cases featured on the show. These families were here before and sadly their children are still missing. Maury is calling on you to help.
